mapper.sql: id, task_id, bucket_name, object_key, file_size, file_version_id, status, virus_found, virus_type, virus_name, scan_time, action_taken, error_message, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM virus_scan_record WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM virus_scan_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM virus_scan_record WHERE virus_found = #{virusFound} ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE virus_scan_record SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

UPDATE virus_scan_record SET status = 'SUCCESS', virus_found = #{virusFound}, virus_type = #{virusType}, virus_name = #{virusName}, action_taken = #{actionTaken}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM virus_scan_record WHERE created_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireDays} DAY)
